Platform

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

A modular suite designed around the way modern events actually run.

Smart scheduling

Multi-track agendas, conflict detection, and instant publish.

Secure check-in

QR + ID verification with anti-fraud signals built in.

Hotel & travel

Negotiated rates, room blocks and guest management.

Live analytics

Revenue, attendance and engagement in real time.

Lightning fast

Built on edge infra. Loads in under a second worldwide.

Crafted UI

An interface your team and attendees will actually enjoy.

Loved by teams

Trusted by event leaders worldwide

"The most polished event platform we've used. Setup took an afternoon."

Elena Vasquez

Head of Events, Lumen

"Our exhibitors love the lead capture flow. Renewals jumped 38%."

Rohan Mehta

Founder, Orbit Expos

"Beautiful UI, real depth. Analytics finally feel actionable."

Naomi Park

VP Marketing, Nimbus
